item.title: LiteLLM Hack: Were You One of the 47,000? 摘要
item.description:
Daniel Hnyk analyzed the BigQuery PyPI dataset to quantify the impact of the LiteLLM supply chain attack. During the 46-minute window when malicious versions 1.82.7 and 1.82.8 were live, they were downloaded 46,996 times. Additionally, 2,337 packages depended on LiteLLM, with 88% not using version pinning that could have prevented the exploit.
标签: security, supply-chain, python, pypi, packaging, litellm, vulnerability, dependency-management, bigquery, open-source

item.title: Improved Analytics in App Store Connect 摘要
item.description:
Apple has launched a major update to App Store Connect Analytics, featuring a redesigned user interface for easier app and game performance tracking while maintaining user privacy. Key changes include app-by-app organization instead of aggregate multi-app views, a new default three-month reporting period (though shorter periods remain available), and the deprecation of older Trends dashboards. Apple acknowledges developer feedback about the lack of cross-app reporting and has provided updated documentation.
标签: Apple, App Store, Analytics, Developer Tools, Mobile Apps, Privacy, User Experience, Performance Tracking, Software Updates, iOS Development

item.title: ‘A List of Chain Restaurants Whose Names Contain Unusual Structures’ 摘要
item.description:
The article discusses ShowBiz Pizza Place, a 1980s rival to Chuck E. Cheese, known for its arcade games like the sit-down Star Wars and Spy Hunter. The author recalls childhood memories of the restaurant, noting its unique name with 'Place' and how some friends mistakenly called it 'ShowBiz Pizza Palace', comparing this to misnaming an iPod Touch as 'iTouch'. The piece reflects on the restaurant's atmosphere, describing it as dark and seedy rather than palatial.
标签: restaurants, 1980s, arcade, nostalgia, ShowBiz Pizza Place, Chuck E. Cheese, gaming, childhood memories, pop culture, misnomers

item.title: datasette-llm 0.1a1 摘要
item.description:
datasette-llm 0.1a1 is a base plugin that integrates LLM models into Datasette for use by other plugins like datasette-enrichments-llm. It introduces a new plugin hook, register_llm_purposes(), and a get_purposes() function to manage and retrieve purpose strings for model assignments. This allows centralized configuration of models for specific tasks, such as data enrichment or SQL query assistance, enabling plugins to request models by purpose and facilitating admin UI development for model-purpose mapping.
标签: datasette, llm, plugins, release, python, ai, database, open-source, tooling, integration

item.title: Thoughts on slowing the fuck down 摘要
item.description:
Mario Zechner, creator of the Pi agent framework, critiques the current trend in agentic engineering where developers prioritize speed over quality, leading to unsustainable complexity. He argues that while agents can generate code rapidly, this removes human oversight, allowing mistakes to compound quickly and creating unmanageable 'cognitive debt.' Zechner advocates for slowing down, setting limits on agent-generated code, and manually writing critical architectural components to maintain system integrity and thoughtful development.
标签: AI, AI/LLM, AI/LLM/Agent, programming, tools, architecture, culture, business
